name: Dear Dopamine
original_name: Dear Dopamine ลุ่มหลงจงรัก
overview:
When love crosses the line of gender, what else can interrupt their happy chemistry?

Castes?! Pedigree?!

Get ready to meet the thrilling relationship of Tul-Posh-Mok-Fan.
